contract_specs.description: Caller-supplied list of contract spec records.
Caller-supplied list of contract spec records.

pricing_inputs.description: Optional caller-supplied pricing context. It is summarized for context and is not used to re-price missing Greeks.

preview.description: Explicit trigger for the default spot-altcoin breakout scan. Pass preview=true.
Explicit trigger for the default perp-altcoin candidate scan. Pass preview=true.

cmcid.description: Canonical asset id used to resolve the base asset symbol.

slug.description: Canonical asset slug used to resolve the base asset symbol.

symbol.description: Base asset symbol, for example BTC, ETH, or SOL.

exchange_list.description: Comma-separated futures venues for aggregated perp CVD and orderbook context.

spot_exchange_list.description: Comma-separated spot venues for aggregated spot CVD confirmation.

lookback_days.description: Controls the primary timeframe history window within package caps; mapped higher/lower timeframe context uses package bucket defaults.

cmcid.description: CMC asset id. Preferred exact identity input.

symbol.description: Target asset symbol.

convert.description: Quote currency for live market evidence.

lookback_days.description: Historical lookback window for technical and market context.

signal_window.description: Recent bar window used for signal context.

evidence_pack.description: Optional caller-supplied source snapshots keyed by neutral source name.

cmcid.description: Asset id (UCID: The Unified Cryptoasset ID), preferred for exact identity resolution, for example 11419 for Toncoin.

id.description: Alias for cmcid, accepted for callers that send asset id under the generic id field.

slug.description: Canonical asset slug such as toncoin.

symbol.description: Target token symbol such as TON, ONDO, or RENDER.

full_name.description: Optional token name used to resolve symbols that map to more than one asset.

convert.description: Quote currency used for the market snapshot.

top_n.description: How many top-ranked breakout candidates receive the deeper narrative pass.

listing_timeframe.description: Price-change window used for the broad market screen.

ohlcv_timeframe.description: Bar interval used for EMA, volume, MACD, and RSI confirmation.

limit.description: Maximum number of listed assets to include in the first-pass market scan.

convert.description: Quote currency used for price and volume comparisons.

market_data.description: Optional caller-provided compact listing rows used for local or pre-fetched execution without live data access.
Optional caller-provided compact listing rows used for local or pre-fetched execution without live data access.

preview.description: Must be true. The skill exposes no user-tunable analytical parameters.

asset.description: Asset ticker. Business output is only supported for BTC and ETH.

time_window.description: Lookback window used for ETF flow aggregation and history-limit sizing.

asset.description: Asset ticker. Current evidence lane supports BTC and ETH only.

time_window.description: Flow and price-response window. Current fast-beta staging supports the 7-session ETF window only.

assets.description: Required comparison assets. This fast-beta version supports BTC and ETH together.

time_window.description: Lookback window requested for ETF flow comparison. Supported values are 7d, 30d, and 90d.

preview.description: Explicit trigger for the default BTC cross-asset preview. Public callers should pass preview=true and nothing else.
Explicit trigger for the default crypto macro preview. When the caller has no execution parameters, pass preview=true.

time_window.description: Requested context bucket. Cross-asset return lanes are latest-snapshot proxies when full-window returns are unavailable; derivatives positioning uses this bucket where available.

fixture_evidence.description: Optional local test/demo override consumed before normalization.

symbol.description: Asset symbol to review, such as BTC or ETH. Defaults to BTC when omitted.

timeframe.description: Review interval for retained market history.

event.description: Macro event keyword or family, such as cpi, inflation, rates, labor, or generic macro shock.

time_window.description: Lookback bucket used to evaluate market, rates, and event context; defaults to 30d when omitted.

current_allocation.description: Caller-supplied list of current allocation records.

cmcid.description: CMC asset id. Preferred exact identity input.

symbol.description: Base asset symbol, for example BTC, ETH, or SOL.

convert.description: Quote currency for OHLCV and live quote requests.

interval.description: Primary kline interval used for the latest-window pattern analysis.

symbol.description: Base asset symbol, for example BTC, ETH, or SOL.

convert.description: Quote currency for OHLCV and live quote requests.

interval.description: Primary kline interval used for the latest-window pattern analysis.

lookback.description: Historical bar count required to support EMA200 and structure calculations.

min_swing_window.description: Swing detection window used for structure and support/resistance clustering.

sr_cluster_pct.description: Cluster threshold for support/resistance grouping as a percentage.

volume_confirm_mult.description: Volume multiple required for pattern confirmation versus SMA20 volume.

divergence_window.description: Swing window used for divergence matching.

divergence_tolerance.description: Bar-index tolerance used when matching price and indicator swings.

request_class.description: Supported request class for this monitor.

live_fetch.description: Optional live public refresh flag. When true, token.address and token.platform are required. When omitted or false, the skill uses caller-supplied compact observations.

token.description: Token identity for the monitor. Caller-supplied mode requires symbol. Live refresh mode requires platform and public token contract address.

holder_snapshot.description: Compact holder metrics such as holder_count, top_10_pct, and holder_count_change_7d. Missing trend is reported as unknown and partial rather than estimated.

dex_flows.description: Compact DEX flow rows with window, swap_count, net_buy_usd, and volume_usd.

pools.description: Compact liquidity rows with pool name, liquidity_usd, and volume_24h_usd.

security_flags.description: Optional bounded security or control flags already safe to show to the user.

limit.description: Maximum number of capped rows returned in each ranked section.

request_class.description: Supported request class for this monitor.

limit.description: Maximum number of capped rows returned in each ranked section.

cmcid.description: Canonical asset id used to resolve the base asset symbol.

slug.description: Canonical asset slug used to resolve the base asset symbol.

symbol.description: Base asset symbol to evaluate, such as BTC or ETH.

venue.description: Venue label used to select the perpetual market context.

window.description: Signal window label used by the setup read.

lookback_days.description: Recent lookback window used to build the setup read.

venue.description: Venue labels used to select aggregate perpetual context.

window.description: Signal window label used by the ranking read.

top_n.description: Maximum number of ranked candidates to return.

symbol.description: Base asset or perpetual pair to inspect, such as BTC or BTCUSDT.

venue.description: Derivatives venue name to inspect as the single venue lane; defaults to Binance.

window.description: Lookback window in Nd format, from 2d to 90d; defaults to 30d.

universe.description: Symbols to rank, such as BTC, ETH, and SOL. Defaults to BTC, ETH, and SOL.

top_n.description: Maximum ranked candidates to return, from 1 to 20. Defaults to 5.

exchange_list.description: Optional caller venue context for the desired scan universe. Current v1 output is a venue-neutral market snapshot and does not claim venue-scoped filtering unless row-level venue data is available.

top_n.description: Maximum number of retained candidates to return. Valid range is 3 to 25.

max_market_cap_usd.description: Maximum market capitalization in USD for low-cap candidate eligibility. Valid range is 10,000,000 to 50,000,000,000.

min_perp_volume_usd_4h.description: Minimum four-hour perpetual volume in USD required for a candidate to pass the liquidity filter.

min_open_interest_change_pct.description: Minimum four-hour open-interest change percentage. Rows must be strictly greater than this threshold; default 0 means rising open interest only. Values may be negative down to -20 and up to 100.

min_funding_rate.description: Minimum average funding rate required for a candidate. Rows must be strictly greater than this threshold; default 0 means positive funding only.

token_id_or_symbol.description: Token symbol, slug, or id to analyze, for example OP or optimism.

window.description: Optional forward unlock window such as 30d or 90d; defaults to the package window when omitted.

request_class.description: Supported request class for this monitor.

limit.description: Maximum number of capped rows returned in each ranked section.

unlocks.description: Compact token unlock rows. Each row should include token, unlock_value_usd, circulating_supply_usd, and may include unlock_date, recipient_type, cliff, and recipient_concentration_pct.

thresholds.description: Optional numeric thresholds. Supported keys include min_unlock_value_usd, large_unlock_pct_supply, and concentrated_recipient_pct.

live_fetch.description: Optional approved public snapshot fetch. If unavailable, the result is blocked instead of estimated.

token_id_or_symbol.description: Token symbol or token identifier to evaluate for unlock-absorption evidence.

request_class.description: Supported request class for this monitor.

limit.description: Maximum number of capped rows returned in each ranked section.

tokens.description: Token symbols or identifiers to compare by unlock risk bucket.

horizon.description: Review horizon in Nd format, such as 90d. Defaults to 90d.

token_id_or_symbol.description: Token symbol or token identifier to assess, such as AAVE.

platform.description: Network or platform name for the token contract, such as ethereum.

token_address.description: Token contract address for the requested platform.

symbol.description: Asset symbol.

position_value_usd.description: USD position value. Required for ranking and risk attribution.

weight_pct.description: Portfolio weight percent. Required for top holding selection. Weights do not need to sum to 100.

network.description: Network label for onchain holdings. Required when contract_address is supplied.

contract_address.description: Token contract address for onchain risk review. Required when network is supplied.

cmcid.description: Asset id (UCID: The Unified Cryptoasset ID), preferred for exact identity resolution.

symbol.description: Target asset symbol. When only symbol is provided, the runner uses the default market-data API resolution.

search_days.description: Official-account lookback window for live social search.

token_profile_context.description: Optional upstream profile snapshot supplied by the caller or User Agent.

official_updates.description: Optional caller-supplied official update records for deterministic fixtures.

news_items.description: Optional caller-supplied public content records for deterministic fixtures.

live_fetch.description: When true, request current package-owned facts. Canonical acceptance uses true.

token_id_or_symbol.description: Token symbol, slug, or id used as the human-readable asset anchor.

platform.description: Chain or platform slug for the token contract, for example ethereum.

platformName.description: Optional alternate platform name accepted by some contract-scoped lanes.

contract_address.description: Token contract address on the specified platform; required to avoid symbol-only ambiguity.

composition_depth.description: Optional composition depth used by the script runner.

live_fetch.description: Set true for a current public venue snapshot; omit when supplying compact caller observations.

symbol.description: Target token symbol such as RENDER, FET, or ONDO.

convert.description: Quote currency forwarded to the category-detail request.

symbol.description: Target token symbol such as CRV, ONDO, or RENDER.

full_name.description: Optional token name used to resolve symbols that map to more than one asset.

convert.description: Quote currency used for the market snapshot.

protocol_slug.description: Optional protocol slug override when a trusted upstream layer already knows which protocol should anchor the profile.

holders_snapshot.description: Optional holder coverage supplied by a trusted upstream layer. Omit it when live ownership coverage is unavailable.

source.description: Coverage status for the supplied holder snapshot.

as_of.description: Timestamp or date that describes when the holder snapshot was observed.

top_10_share_pct.description: Top-10 ownership share percentage if known.

top_20_share_pct.description: Top-20 ownership share percentage if known.

retail_share_pct.description: Retail ownership share percentage if known.

whale_concentration_pct.description: Whale concentration percentage when a live holder lane is available.

long_term_holders_pct.description: Long-term holder percentage when a live holder lane is available.

holder_trend.description: Ownership trend label from a trusted upstream holder lane.

top_n.description: Number of highest-priority setups to keep in the primary candidate list.

timeframe.description: Deep-review timeframe forwarded to the selected top setups.

min_oi_usd.description: Minimum open-interest filter used before ranking the perp universe.

oi_change_threshold.description: Minimum open-interest change threshold that counts as an anomaly.

fr_threshold.description: Absolute funding threshold used for extreme-funding signals.

lsr_threshold.description: Long-short-ratio threshold used to flag one-sided crowding.

lsr_timeframes.description: Timeframes used when checking long-short-ratio crowding.

use_spot_confirmation.description: Whether to keep the optional spot-confirmation downgrade layer enabled.

pre_top_k.description: Optional number of pre-ranked candidates to review before selecting top_n.

snapshot_per_page.description: Snapshot page size for the multi-page perp universe scan.

snapshot_max_pages.description: Maximum number of snapshot pages to scan before ranking candidates.

symbol_allowlist.description: Optional list of symbols to keep inside the scan universe.

excluded_symbols.description: Optional list of symbols to exclude from the scan universe.

symbol.description: Target token symbol such as CRV, RENDER, or ONDO.

full_name.description: Optional token name used to disambiguate symbols that map to multiple assets.

convert.description: Quote currency used for the market snapshot.

kol_search_hours.description: Lookback window, in hours, for the discussion scan.

business_data.description: Optional caller-provided token identity, market snapshot, and discussion analysis used for local or pre-fetched execution without live data access.

time_window.description: Input field for monitor altcoin season transition; provide time window when overriding the default.

preview.description: Must be true. The skill exposes no user-tunable analytical parameters.
Default trigger for the current macro news aggregation run.

lookback_hours.description: Lookback window for new macro, geopolitical, and tech-stock-relevant public information.

live_fetch.description: When true, run current package-owned search and cleaning.

include_recent_discussion.description: Whether to request a recent discussion layer in addition to the core indicator read. Fast-beta keeps this optional layer disabled unless an approved discussion lane is available.

lookback_days.description: Number of calendar days used for recent trend context.

series.description: Optional caller-supplied observation snapshot for deterministic replay or fixture execution.

live_fetch.description: Optional legacy flag; when series is absent, the script automatically fetches current macro observations.

notional_usd.description: Input field for estimate large trade liquidity risk; provide notional usd when overriding the default.

asset.description: Optional asset symbol or short asset label linked to the event.

max_posts.description: Maximum content-search request limit, from 1 to 10; defaults to 10.

time_window.description: Briefing lookback window used for market, macro, sector, and headline context.

symbol.description: Base asset or market pair to inspect, such as BTC or BTCUSDT.

venue.description: Supported market venue name to inspect; defaults to Binance.

window.description: Lookback window in Nd form from 2d to 90d; defaults to 30d.

time_window.description: Sentiment monitoring window. Defaults to the script's standard 30d horizon when omitted.

handles.description: KOL handles to inspect for recent consensus-shift evidence.

asset.description: Crypto asset symbol to use for the consensus-reversal check, such as BTC.

lookback_hours.description: Recent discussion window in hours; must be from 1 to 168.

max_posts.description: Maximum recent posts to retain for bounded analysis; values are clamped to the supported range.

protocol.description: Protocol or pool name to check, such as aave-v3.

time_window.description: Lookback window requested for borrow/lend stress context, in Nd format.

symbol.description: Asset symbol to monitor. Defaults to BTC when omitted.

chain.description: Chain label used to filter transfer rows. Defaults to ethereum when omitted.

stablecoins.description: Compact stablecoin observation rows. Each row should include asset, optional chain, circulating_usd, change_1d_usd, and peg_price. Required and non-empty for caller-supplied mode unless live_fetch=true; scripts/run.py performs numeric validation.

bridges.description: Compact bridge observation rows. Each row should include name, optional chain, volume_24h_usd, and change_1d_pct. Required and non-empty for caller-supplied mode unless live_fetch=true; scripts/run.py performs numeric validation.

thresholds.description: Optional interpretation thresholds, including min_flow_usd and peg_alert_bps. scripts/run.py performs numeric validation.

limit.description: Maximum number of capped rows returned in each ranked section.

live_fetch.description: Optional live snapshot request. If the approved public snapshot is unavailable, the skill returns DATA_UNAVAILABLE instead of fabricating metrics.

request_class.description: Supported request class for this monitor.

limit.description: Maximum number of capped rows returned in each ranked section.

asset.description: Asset symbol for the planned exchange transfer.

amount.description: Transfer amount for the planned exchange transfer.

destination.description: Destination summary supplied by the caller for the transfer.

require_whitelist_check.description: Whether the destination must pass a whitelist check before transfer.

travel_rule_required.description: Whether travel-rule information is required before release.

network.description: Chosen transfer network for the planned route.
Network label for the supplied withdrawal route candidate.

fee_usd.description: Estimated withdrawal fee expressed in USD for the candidate network.

eta_minutes.description: Expected completion time in minutes for the candidate network.

reliability_score.description: Reliability score for the candidate network on a zero-to-one scale.

min_amount_usd.description: Minimum withdrawal amount in USD supported by the candidate network.

status.description: Operational status for the candidate network.

candidate_networks.description: Caller-supplied list of candidate network records.

amount.description: Withdrawal amount in USD used to test network eligibility and ranking.

destination.description: Optional destination note used for operator context.

event.description: Match locator {home, away, date?}; when given (and consensus/quotes not supplied) the skill self-fetches both the executable prediction-market quotes and the external devig consensus.

team.description: Team name for outright mode when event is not supplied.

consensus_probabilities.description: Normalized consensus probabilities by outcome (caller override; else self-fetched devig average from multi-bookmaker h2h).

consensus_bands.description: Optional uncertainty bands by outcome, each as [low, high].

market_quotes.description: Executable quote or VWAP evidence by outcome (caller override; else self-fetched from the prediction-market order book).

rule_gate_pass.description: Whether settlement scope has already passed rule comparison.

target_size_usd.description: Target executable size represented by the supplied quote evidence.

carry_apr.description: Annualized carry assumption for longer-dated markets.

days_to_settlement.description: Optional settlement horizon for carry adjustment.

positions.description: Optional list of position objects. If omitted, top-level fields are treated as one position.

items.description: One caller-supplied World Cup prediction-market position row.

team.description: Team name for team-linked tournament markets.

market_type.description: Supported market family for the row.

outcome.description: Optional binary or match outcome label. Defaults to YES for table display.

price.description: Caller-supplied probability price for this computation. Rows without price are blocked.

size_usd.description: Premium at risk in USD. Rows without size_usd are blocked.

held.description: Whether the row is an existing position. Existing rows use a hold-value fee treatment.

market_type.description: Supported market family for a single-position shorthand.

price.description: Caller-supplied probability price for a single-position shorthand. Required for a computable row in this package.

size_usd.description: Premium at risk in USD for a single-position shorthand. Required for a computable row in this package.

held.description: Whether the row represents an existing position rather than a new entry.

benchmark_apy.description: Annual benchmark rate used for excess APY. Defaults to 0.04 and is disclosed when defaulted.

bankroll_usd.description: Optional bankroll denominator for capital-share context.

one_time_cost_usd.description: Optional one-time cost included in the net APY calculation.

symbol.description: Crypto asset symbol for the probability envelope.

horizon_days.description: Forecast context horizon in calendar days; used only for probability framing, not a guaranteed target date.

bands_pct.description: Return-move bands in percent for scenario probability estimates.

observations.description: Caller-supplied close observations for the symbol; expected rows include date and close values.

home.description: Home-side team name or supported alias.

away.description: Away-side team name or supported alias.

stage.description: Match stage. Knockout stages add an advance probability.

pre_match_market_compare.description: When true, compare against caller-supplied executable quotes. Defaults to true.

market_quotes.description: Optional rows for home_win, draw, and away_win with bid, ask, depth_bid_usd, and depth_ask_usd.

pk_elo_adjust.description: Optional knockout penalty adjustment, clamped to plus or minus five percentage points around 50 percent.

fee_rate.description: Optional taker fee rate as a decimal. Defaults to 0.03 when quote comparison is used.

venue_country.description: Optional venue country. Host advantage is applied only when a host team is confirmed at home.

group.description: Optional group label, such as A through L.

score_observed_at.description: Optional ISO timestamp for when the caller observed the live scores.

match_states.description: Required rows for one four-team group. Finished rows need a score; in-play rows need score and minute; not-started rows may include caller three-way probabilities.

items.description: One group match state row with teams, status, score, minute, and optional probabilities.

home.description: Home team name for the group match row.

away.description: Away team name for the group match row.

state.description: Normalized match state used by the scenario grid.

probabilities.description: Optional three-way probabilities for a not-started match row.

market_prices.description: Optional caller-supplied YES-price marks by team. Accepts either a flat team map or nested group_winner / reach_r16 maps.

include_market_comparison.description: Set false to skip the market comparison lane.

team.description: Team name or short code for the chain scan. Required unless full_scan is true or chain_markets is supplied by the caller.

full_scan.description: Explicitly request a wider team scan when live discovery assets are available.

include_mutex_groups.description: Include mutually exclusive basket checks when basket evidence is supplied.

chain_markets.description: Optional caller-supplied executable chain evidence with layer, bid, ask, depth, fee, and optional orderbook levels.

mutex_baskets.description: Optional caller-supplied mutually exclusive basket evidence for basket sum checks.

elo_anchor.description: Optional conditional probability anchor values keyed by conditional name or team.

min_edge_cents.description: Minimum gross edge in cents before a chain conflict is emitted.

min_depth_usd.description: Minimum available depth in USD for actionable tiering.

include_diagnostics.description: Include method thresholds and lane counters for review.

position.description: Position object with team or market reference, side, shares, current_bid or bid_levels, quote/orderbook age or timestamp, optional p_adv_market, price_if_adv, expected_hold_days, avg_cost, and optional model_probability.

timeline.description: Optional catalyst timeline rows or expected-hold-days context relevant to the hold decision.

token_id.description: Optional public outcome token identifier used only for lightweight external quote validation; position-level token_id is also accepted.

clob_token_id.description: Optional alias for token_id used only for lightweight external quote validation.

asset_id.description: Optional alias for token_id used only for lightweight external quote validation.

venue.description: Venue, wallet bucket, or reporting bucket.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 timestamp used for day-level grouping.

pnl_usd.description: Modeled PnL contribution in USD for the row.

attribution_granularity.description: Grouping dimension used for the attribution result.

venue.description: Venue, wallet bucket, or reporting bucket.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 timestamp used for day-level grouping.

pnl_usd.description: Modeled PnL contribution in USD for the row.

attribution_granularity.description: Grouping dimension used for the attribution result.

value_usd.description: Current modeled USD value for the holding row.

venue.description: Venue, wallet bucket, or custody location.

strategy.description: Optional strategy label used for concentration grouping.

live_fetch.description: Optional request for approved public market context when runtime access is available; concentration math still depends on caller-supplied holdings.

value_usd.description: Current modeled USD value for the holding row.

venue.description: Venue, wallet bucket, or custody location.

strategy.description: Optional strategy label used for concentration grouping.

venue_mapping.description: Caller-supplied venue normalization or bucket mapping object.

items.description: Optional strategy tag provided by the caller.

strategy_tags.description: Caller-supplied list of strategy tag records.

category.description: Optional case-insensitive filter matched against pool project, chain, or symbol; use all for the full yield-pool universe.

top_n.description: Number of ranked pools to return, from 1 to 20.

request_class.description: Exact supported request class for this treasury-flow monitor.

institutions.description: Compact institutional treasury rows required unless live_fetch is true. Each row needs name, holdings_usd, and change_30d_units; asset, symbol, and holdings_units improve readability.

name.description: Institution or public treasury holder name.

symbol.description: Optional public equity or holder symbol.

asset.description: Digital asset tracked by the treasury row, such as BTC.

change_30d_units.description: Recent unit change used to classify accumulation, reduction, or unchanged flow.

treasuries.description: Optional compact protocol treasury rows with protocol, treasury_usd, and stable_usd.

thresholds.description: Optional filters, including min_holdings_usd and material_change_units.

limit.description: Maximum number of rows returned in each ranked section.

live_fetch.description: Optional request for a public treasury snapshot when caller-supplied rows are not provided; unavailable required observations return DATA_UNAVAILABLE.

caller_evidence.description: Optional caller-supplied compact wallet PnL evidence for environments where live wallet lanes are unavailable.

protocol.description: Public protocol slug to evaluate, such as aave.

top_n.description: Maximum token concentration rows to return when the data lane is available, from 1 to 20.

venue.description: Venue labels used to select aggregate perpetual context.

top_n.description: Maximum number of ranked candidates to return.

token_id_or_symbol.description: Asset symbol or numeric asset id to review.

timeframe.description: Primary candle interval. The skill pairs it with the next higher structure window for confluence.

max_gain_threshold.description: Minimum historical signal gain requested by the caller.

top_n_deep_dive.description: Number of candidate tokens requested for deeper review. The runtime budget caps this at 2.

venue.description: Venue labels used to select aggregate perpetual context.

lookback_days.description: Recent lookback window used to build the setup read.

top_n.description: Maximum number of ranked candidates to return.

venue.description: Venue labels used to select aggregate perpetual context.

lookback_days.description: Recent lookback window used to build the setup read.

top_n.description: Maximum number of ranked candidates to return.

request_class.description: Supported request class for this monitor.

limit.description: Maximum number of capped rows returned in each ranked section.

request_class.description: Supported request class for this monitor.

limit.description: Maximum number of capped rows returned in each ranked section.

allowed_x_handles.description: Optional X handles that constrain live x_search to specific public accounts.

query.description: Public social topic or search phrase to compare with market movement.

symbol.description: Crypto asset symbol for the market side of the divergence check.

lookback_hours.description: Lookback window in hours, from 1 to 168; defaults to 24.

max_posts.description: Maximum content-search request limit, from 1 to 10; defaults to 10.

caller_evidence.description: Optional caller-supplied compact token safety evidence for environments where live safety lanes are unavailable.

claim.description: Public market claim to test, such as a claim that BTC momentum is accelerating while liquidity improves.

symbol.description: Crypto asset symbol to compare against market context, such as BTC.

query.description: Optional public-discussion query terms. Defaults to the symbol and claim keywords when omitted.

lookback_hours.description: Recent public-discussion window in hours. Defaults to 24 and must be between 1 and 168.

max_posts.description: Maximum public-discussion items to summarize. Defaults to 25 and is capped at 100.
